title: Kick streamer Clavicular avoids father after overdose incident as Miami club appearance raises serious questions
summary_full: Braden Peters, known as Clavicular, refused to meet his father after a suspected overdose in Miami. His father, Ken Peters, flew in from New Jersey to help but left without seeing him, as reported by TMZ. Despite promising change, Clavicular attended a club event, raising concerns that the situation is becoming a serious personal and family issue.
